hero.headline: Leadership rooted in equity, creativity, and global impact.
hero.subheading: World Class Scholars is led by Dr Christopher Appiah-Thompson, whose work brings together education, advocacy, digital media, disability inclusion, dementia care, mental health awareness, and social justice.

biography.heading: About the founder.
biography.body: Dr Christopher Appiah-Thompson brings a public mission shaped by scholarship, creative practice, advocacy, and a deep commitment to human dignity. His leadership reflects a belief that education should not only inform, but also heal, connect, empower, and open new possibilities for people and communities.
